name: Lowfat Turkey/Chicken Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chicken broth or 1 bouillon cube and 1 cup water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large saucepan over low heat, melt butter.
3. Blend in flour and seasonings.
4. Cook, stirring constantly until smooth and bubbly.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in broth and evaporated milk.
6. Heat mixture to boil, stirring constantly.
7. Boil and stir for one minute.
8. Stir in sherry.
9. Pour into a 2-quart casserole dish.
10. Sprinkle cheese on top.
11. Bake, uncovered, for 30 minutes or until bubbly.
